Create Sourcing Event for Approved Supplier
description: Create a sourcing event for a supplier that has been approved for sourcing activities. Verify that the supplier is listed as an approved supplier in the Coupa system and that the sourcing event is successfully created.

scenario: Attempt Sourcing Event with Inactive Supplier
description: Create a sourcing event for a supplier that has been deactivated or is inactive in the Coupa system. Verify that the system prevents the creation of the sourcing event and displays an error message indicating that the supplier is inactive.

scenario: Validate Sourcing Event Reporting
description: Create a sourcing event and verify that the reporting capabilities in Coupa provide actionable insights into sourcing events, supplier performance, and spend data. Validate that the reporting data is accurate and up-to-date.

scenario: Customize Sourcing Settings and Configurations
description: Verify that only authorized users have the authority to customize sourcing settings and configurations in Coupa. Test that users without the necessary permissions are unable to access or modify sourcing settings.

scenario: Track Savings for Sourcing Event
description: Create a sourcing event and track the savings achieved through the event. Verify that the savings are accurately calculated and displayed in the Coupa system.

scenario: Create RFP with Centre-Managed Commodities
